checks.description: Validate that the interval between successive toggles of clk_div consists of an odd number of clk cycles, reflecting the odd divisor behavior.
checks.pass_condition: For at least two consecutive toggle periods, the count of clk cycles between rising edges (or falling edges) of clk_div is an odd number and no X/Z values appear on clk_div.
checks.trigger_condition: When clk_div exhibits a toggle after reset release.

checks.description: Require that clk_div transitions from a stable post‑reset value to a defined toggling behavior within a bounded observation window.
checks.pass_condition: clk_div changes value at least once within 10 clk cycles after reset deassertion and never assumes X or Z during that window.
